purpose: State exactly which DebugTool-style debug needs are satisfied by parsed OpenDatasheet facts and which still require project/bench evidence.

coverage_levels.covered: Parsed facts directly provide the needed device/package knowledge.
coverage_levels.covered_for_first_pass: Parsed facts are enough to rank hypotheses and request the right first evidence batch.
coverage_levels.partial_project_binding_required: Parsed facts provide capability/pin/constraint priors, but the selected project instance must bind nets, IP parameters, or measured state.
coverage_levels.external_required: Not a datasheet/package fact; must come from project files, lab measurements, or tool logs.

parsed_facts: MSEL pins via SDM_IO optional functions
AS/AVST boot pins via SDM_IO optional functions
SDM/config/core rail names and nominal voltage specs
Agilex 5 package/device identity for tool mismatch checks
external_required: jtagconfig -n / Quartus Programmer Auto Detect output
FPGA-end TCK/TMS/TDI/TDO waveforms
connector VREF, cable power sense, ground, ribbon/adapter continuity
actual JTAG chain order and bypass-device state
programming file and Quartus device support version
requirements.known_translation: Generic CONF_DONE/INIT_DONE checks in FPGA debug recipes must be translated to Agilex 5 nCONFIG/nSTATUS, SDM_IO boot pins, and Quartus status evidence.

parsed_facts: POR delay and configuration clock constraints
external_required: selected boot mode from schematic/Quartus settings
flash or host interface schematic nets
boot bus activity waveform at FPGA end
actual pull-up/pull-down and unused SDM_IO policy from schematic

parsed_facts: monotonic ramp rule and core/SDM/HPS/GTS rail groupings
external_required: actual regulator topology
enable/PG dependency graph
same-window ramp waveforms
rail noise and brownout measurements
board net aliases matching rail names

parsed_facts: GTS transceiver channel count and supported protocols
refclk pair package balls and lane group mappings
external_required: selected protocol/IP instance
actual lane polarity/order and connector mapping
refclk source schematic and jitter measurement
PERST#/reset sideband implementation where protocol requires it
Transceiver Toolkit / PCIe HIP / protocol status logs
selected MIPI IP lane count/order/polarity
project lane-to-ball assignment
LP11/stopstate/HS clock/data state
packet counters, VC/data type/ECC/CRC
source/sink timing and register initialization evidence
requirements.boundary: Enough to trigger the right DebugTool path and request the right evidence, not enough to close a MIPI no-frame/no-video root cause alone.

parsed_facts: DQS/DQ package group hints by bank
external_required: selected EMIF IP parameters
memory topology and schematic byte-lane binding
calibration report/toolkit state
memory clock/reset/reference voltage measurements
requirements.boundary: Enough for review and first evidence request; EMIF calibration closure still needs Quartus/project and lab evidence.

external_required: SOF success and jtagconfig -n node list
sopcinfo/System ID/debug module/JTAG UART
reset vector, exception vector, memory map, and regenerated hardware image
requirements.boundary: OpenDatasheet can anchor JTAG/device facts; Nios failure analysis is necessarily project-file dependent.

parsed_facts: A5ED HPS presence and core profile
external_required: selected HPS boot source and pinmux
HPS reset/clock/rail waveforms
UART console, boot ROM/error code, debugger/JTAG state
boot image and secure-boot configuration
requirements.boundary: The knowledge pool has enough package facts for HPS debug evidence planning, but DebugTool should add a dedicated HPS boot link model.
